description_long: This is a white Jeep Wrangler SUV with a tan soft top roof and black trim, designed for both urban and off-road environments. The vehicle features a boxy, utilitarian body with pronounced fender flares, a classic seven-slot front grille, and round headlights. The side profile reveals two doors, black side mirrors, and rugged black wheels with a visible spare tire mounted on the rear. The windows are tinted, and the soft top appears to be made of canvas or vinyl, providing a contrast to the hard metal body. The rear view shows a centrally mounted spare tire and rectangular taillights, while the front view highlights the iconic Jeep branding and a visible license plate. The overall design is robust, functional, and instantly recognizable as a classic Jeep model.
description: A white Jeep Wrangler SUV with a tan soft top, black wheels, and a rugged, boxy design. Features include two doors, a spare tire on the rear, and classic Jeep styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the seven-slot grille, round headlights, Jeep logo, and license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the two-door configuration, tan soft top, black wheels, and side mirrors.
description_view_2: Rear view with the spare tire mounted on the back, rectangular taillights, and the tan soft top covering the rear window.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the door, tan soft top, and black wheels.
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke black steel wheels with a simple, rugged design
